content: The phone just connected. The agent is greeting you.
Hi, yes, I'm calling about my dermatology referral—did my doctor send that through yet?
The agent said: Recorded for quality and training purposes.
Oh okay, that's fine. So, um, did Dr. Harrison get my dermatology referral submitted?
The agent said: Pivot Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?
Oh! Wait, this is orthopedics? I think I called the wrong office—I was trying to reach my regular doctor. Can you guys refer me to a dermatologist, or should I call back to my GP's office?

The agent said: Pivot Point Orthopedic specializes in joints and Bone care but we don't provide referrals to dermatologists. It's best to contact your regular doctor's office for a dermatologist referral.
Got it, thanks for letting me know. But actually, while I have you on the line—I've been having some wrist pain lately. Could I schedule an appointment with one of your doctors for that?
The agent said: Sure, I can help with that. Please provide your date of birth.
Sure, it's April 27, 1975.
The agent said: I'll need your full name, including your last name, along with your date of birth to schedule the appointment. Could you please provide your last name?
Oh sorry, it's Jennifer Mills. So that's Jennifer Mills, April 27, 1975.

The agent said: To help find your record. Do you want to use the phone number you have on file with us? If so please tell me that number, if you're not sure, I can confirm your name and date of birth. Again,
I'm not sure what number I have on file with you since I've never been there before. But you can use 650-555-0789—that's my current number.
The agent said: Prefer no problem. Could you please spell out your first and last name for me and confirm your date of birth 1 more time.
Sure—J-E-N-N-I-F-E-R, M-I-L-L-S, and my date of birth is April 27, 1975.
The agent said: I can't proceed further right now but I can make sure our Clinic support team follows up with you.
Okay, that works. Thanks so much for your help!
The agent said: Someone from pivot, connecting you to a representative.
Alright, I appreciate it. Talk to you soon!
The agent said: Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.
Okay, goodbye!
